_note: Pre-W1 file declared merge/ci/health all 'skipped' — every claim contradicted by observable reality. Rewritten in W1-reconciliation per .tl/plans/2026-05-22-gap-closure-wave-plan.yaml to remove the lies.

prs.title: feat(prod-deploy): server bootstrap + code wiring + GH Actions deploy (TECH-016..024)
fix: add upload button to catalog page header
fix: TUS upload metadata key — filetype instead of mime_type (UC-100)
fix: register content-type parser for TUS PATCH (prevented 415)

merge.note: Historical v0.2.0 release used a mix of PRs (#1..#4) and direct-to-main commits. Strict mode requires either project_kind=prototype + signed exception with affected_gates=[skipped-pr], OR every release commit via PR+CI. See W10-release-readiness + EXC-2026-05-22-v020-historical-skipped-pr (per OQ-6 resolution).

ci.gap: Wave-tip f925479 is 4+ commits ahead of last recorded green run; W2-repo-checks records repo-checks-GREEN:<wave-tip-sha> evidence.

health.method: deploy-production.yml runs `curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "${PROD_URL}/api/health"` in a 30x5s loop after every deploy
health._w4_distinction: HEALTH_ONLY (HTTP 200 on /api/health) is NEVER product-readiness evidence per nacl-tl-release/SKILL.md:181. PROD_GOLDEN_PATH for UC-100→UC-200→UC-300→UC-302 is gated on GAP-020 closure in W7-qa-provider.

graph._drift_note: ADR-005 (TUS) in graph is REVOKED by W3-external-contracts (ADR-012 successor for S3-multipart). Tracked in GAP-002.

yougile.note: YouGile not configured for this project (config.yaml.yougile = {})

exceptions.purpose: Retroactive coverage for v0.2.0 release that landed direct-to-main before W11 strict mode existed. Frozen-in-history: expiry = release date; provides no carve-out for any future release.
